action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time sensor data including gas concentrations, airflow velocity, and pressure for specific locations.

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current power grid load and a list of all active safety alerts.

action_set_definitions.name: diagnose_anomaly
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes the telemetry to determine the root cause of the gas hazard at a specific location.

location.description: The location where the anomaly is detected.

action_set_definitions.name: get_fan_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all ventilation fans, their current speed/setting, and their associated sector.

action_set_definitions.name: set_fan_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the operational speed (RPM) or power setting of a specific fan.

fan_id.description: The unique identifier for the fan.

speed_rpm.description: The target speed in Revolutions Per Minute.

state_description.fan_registry: Current operational status and speed of all ventilation fans.
state_description.gas_concentrations: Internal mapping of gas levels (CH4, CO, O2) at various junction points and work faces.
state_description.airflow_network: Airflow velocity (m/s) and pressure (Pa) across the mine branches.
state_description.atmospheric_pressure: Ambient surface pressure affecting the ventilation circuit.
state_description.power_grid_load: Current cumulative power consumption of the ventilation system in kW.
state_description.safety_alerts: List of active environmental hazard flags (e.g., 'high_methane').
